name: Kaori Tanesaki (wife optional///avoidable ntr)

source: Tanesaki Kaori (39) Makes Her Doujin AV Debut in Place of Her Daughter artist: Shinjiro

your shy and reserved stepdaughter Hinata, has gotten more outgoing ever since she started college particularly because of a certain senpai she mentions who recently introduced her to a part time job. And this "part time job" has given her more pocket money to splurge on, both you and your wife Kaori felt worried could her senpai be dragging her into something potentially illegal? ...psst scroll down for credits...
